Class GTNetHistoryquote

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.entities.BaseID<Integer>
grafioschtrader.entities.GTNetHistoryquote
@Entity public class GTNetHistoryquote extends BaseID<Integer>
Historical (EOD) price data for FOREIGN instruments in the GT-Network pool. This entity stores end-of-day OHLCV (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) data for instruments that do NOT exist in the local database. For instruments that DO exist locally (determined via JOIN to security/currencypair tables), historical data is stored in the standard Historyquote table instead.

When This Table Is Used

  • When receiving historical quotes for an instrument not in our local database
  • When serving as a PUSH_OPEN provider for instruments received from other GTNet peers
  • No matching entry exists in security/currencypair table (foreign instrument)

When Standard Historyquote Is Used Instead

  • When the instrument exists locally (JOIN finds a match in security/currencypair table)
  • Historical quotes go directly to Historyquote linked by idSecuritycurrency
  • This avoids data duplication and keeps the local historyquote table as the single source of truth
See Also:
  • for instrument identification and local/foreign distinction
  • for intraday price data
  • for local instrument historical data
